text.title: AI Convention Anchoring Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply AI Convention Anchoring end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: inventory
step.action: List existing conventions scattered across docs/PRs.

step.name: consolidate
step.action: Author CONVENTIONS.md with sections per area.

step.name: per-module-context
step.action: Add per-dir AGENTS.md notes referencing CONVENTIONS.md.

step.name: lint-mechanise
step.action: Add lint rules per recurring violation; wire into pre-commit.
